description: NEGATIVE fixture register — exercises every failable rule: (a) contributor-unresolved (core.phantom); (b) concept-canonical-source (canonicalSource not in contributors); (c) contributor-shared (core.health-events in two concepts); (d) operator-trace-must-be-channel (core.bad-log Resource declares an origin) + kind-mismatch (concept 'd' declares diagnostic-channel but its source is a Resource) + projection-unresolved (jf-missing-surface) + stateful-requires-liveness (stateful with no livenessOwner); (e) stream-uncovered — core.action-ledger is declared in the catalog but is no concept's contributor and is not in outOfFamily (575 §13 L1 reverse-coverage); and (f) live-concept-unprojected (575 §17 Face B) — concept 'e' is stateful with NO projection (it carries a livenessOwner so it isolates the new rule rather than re-tripping stateful-requires-liveness). The gate must FAIL all remaining rules (liveness-window-coherent was RETIRED in 575 §17 Face A — the window is now generated, not drift-checked).

concepts.livenessOwner: fixture: a stateful concept that declares NO projection — isolates live-concept-unprojected (575 §17 Face B). Its contributor is also a phantom, so it adds to contributor-unresolved; it has a livenessOwner so it does NOT trip stateful-requires-liveness, keeping the new rule's demonstration clean.
